title: Content Clipper (Short-Form Video) — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.

title: Admin Assistant for High-Level Clients
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Administrative Assistant. This role is responsible for overseeing Mike Barron’s high-level clients. The Administrative Assistant will work directly with the owner of the company and the supervisors, who will play a vital role in supporting our high-level students, ensuring their success when it comes to building a company. Your primary responsibility will be to manage high level accounts, keep these accounts organized, work with the owner of the company when it comes to scheduling, ensure that these clients are completing the program and utilizing all inside personnel to get tasks completed.



Responsibilities:

Work directly with founder Mike Barron and his supervisors to manage and support high-level client accounts.

Schedule meetings between Mike Barron, supervisors, and partners to ensure alignment and progress.

Equip partners with the essential tools they need for success.

Serve as the primary point of contact for partners, handling communication across various channels with professionalism and efficiency.

Manage invitations to partner events featuring Mike Barron, confirming attendance and ensuring seamless coordination.

Oversee client progress in programs, ensuring they are meeting milestones and utilizing all available resources and personnel.

Keep accounts and schedules organized to streamline operations and enhance client satisfaction.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience as an Administrative Assistant or in a similar role.

Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills.

Strong written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with scheduling tools.

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.

A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a client-focused approach.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
/watch?v=LdqINft4osw&t=75s.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. title: Senior SEO Content Writer - Must DO Application Requirements
description:
Role Overview



We are hiring a Senior SEO Content Writer to take full ownership of content that drives organic traffic, rankings, and conversions.



This is not a generic writing role. You will be responsible for understanding search intent, building content structure, and producing content that performs.



You must be able to think strategically, execute independently, and consistently produce content aligned with both SEO and brand voice.



A strong understanding of EEAT (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) is required.



Key Responsibilities

Plan and execute SEO content strategy based on business goals

Conduct keyword research, SERP analysis, and search intent mapping

Build detailed content outlines and briefs before writing

Write high-quality, long-form content (blogs, landing pages, guides)

Edit and refine content to improve clarity, structure, and performance

Optimize existing content for rankings, CTR, and conversions

Implement strong on-page SEO (headings, internal linking, structure)

Apply EEAT principles through depth, accuracy, and credible sourcing

Use AI tools effectively by creating, refining, and improving prompts

Track content performance and iterate based on data

Writing, Editing, and Brand Voice

Must be able to quickly understand and adapt to different brand voices

Strong ability to maintain tone, consistency, and positioning across content

Excellent editing skills — able to improve clarity, flow, and readability

High attention to detail in grammar, sentence structure, and formatting

Mastery of prepositions, punctuation, and written English is required

Able to turn rough inputs into clear, structured, on-brand content

Industry Exposure



You should be comfortable writing across multiple industries. Please show experience in areas such as:



SaaS

Agencies / marketing services

Local businesses

E-commerce

B2B services

Any technical or specialized industries



You must be able to research and produce authoritative content in unfamiliar domains.



Requirements

4–6+ years of experience in SEO content writing

Proven track record of ranking content on Google

Strong understanding of search intent, on-page SEO, and content structure

Clear understanding and application of EEAT in content

Strong ability to create, modify, and refine AI prompts for content generation

Excellent command of English, including grammar, punctuation, and sentence construction

Experience with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Surfer, Clearscope, or similar

Strong research and analytical thinking

KPIs

Organic traffic growth

Keyword rankings (Top 3 / Top 10)

Content-driven conversions

Quality and consistency of output

Performance improvements on updated content

Application Requirements



To be considered, you must include the following:



3–5 SEO articles you have written that are currently ranking. Include target keywords and performance details if available

A short breakdown of one article:

Search intent

Why it performed (or didn’t)

What you would improve



A structured content outline for:

"SEO agency for small business" (Warren Digital)



Your outline must include:



Primary and secondary search intent

Target audience and stage of awareness

Logical heading structure (H1–H3)

Key sections required to compete with top-ranking pages

How you would differentiate the content

Where and how you would include conversion elements (CTAs, trust signals)

EEAT signals you would incorporate (case studies, proof, authority, etc.)

A Loom video (5–10 minutes) where you:

Analyze a top-ranking article for a keyword

Explain why it ranks

Break down structure, intent, and SEO elements

Identify EEAT signals

Explain how you would outperform it

List the industries you have written for

Job Description: Creative Designer



Position Overview:



We are seeking a talented and versatile Designer with expertise in developing marketing ads and
 for E-commerce brands to join our dynamic marketing team. The ideal candidate will specialize in both Klaviyo
 design and crafting compelling social ad creatives, including video, motion, and static assets. 



As a key member of our team, you will be responsible for creating visually striking, high-converting ad creatives for our clients' paid social campaigns and designing engaging
 campaigns that effectively communicate our brand message, driving both customer engagement and conversions. 



As a member of the Production Team, you will be working under the Director of Production, but report directly to the Creative Strategist and
 Marketing Lead. You will also work with other members of the production and design team to produce high-quality, on-brand designs that seamlessly align with our comprehensive marketing strategy.



Responsibilities:



Collaborate with the Creative Strategist and
 Strategist: Work closely with the team to understand client objectives, target audience, and campaign requirements.

Design High-Quality Ad Creatives: Create visually appealing and compelling ad content that effectively communicates the client's message and captures the attention of the target audience, while staying within Andromeda’s updated creative standards. 

Transform Client Assets: Utilize client-provided assets such as videos, images, and brand guidelines to develop ad-ready content, ensuring that it aligns with the client's brand identity and campaign goals.

Leverage AI tools to generate high-quality visuals when client assets are limited, including transforming product images into static, motion, and video creatives, enhancing existing assets, and producing on-brand content that aligns with platform best practices and client standards.

Conceptualize and Ideate: Generate innovative ideas and concepts for ad designs, considering current design trends, platform best practices, and target audience preferences.

Must understand and meet Meta’s creative diversity standards by developing clearly distinct ad concepts (not minor details of the same design). Consistently test different angles, formats, and layouts so each ad looks and feels unique.

Adapt and Optimize Designs: Modify and optimize existing designs based on feedback from the creative strategist,
 strategist, and client, ensuring that the final creatives meet the desired specifications and objectives within a timely manner.

Maintain Design Quality: Uphold high-quality standards for all ad creatives, ensuring that they are visually appealing, error-free, and optimized for various platforms and devices.

Design and Develop
 Campaigns: Craft visually compelling
 campaigns in Klaviyo or other designated
 marketing platforms, using assets from the client, to support our e-commerce objectives.

AI Designs: Utilize AI image-generation tools to create engaging, on-brand visuals for
 marketing campaigns, including promotional graphics, product features, lifestyle imagery, and seasonal campaign assets to enhance customer engagement and conversion.

Collaborate with the Team: Coordinate and collaborate with tea
mbers to ensure proactive communication and alignment on objectives, deadlines and timelines. 

Stay Updated on Design Trends: You are Shopanova’s go to for design trends, emerging technologies, AI tools, and best practices in the advertising and e-commerce industries. We expect you to apply this knowledge to enhance the quality and effectiveness of ad and
 designs.

A great creator never sits idle, we expect you to proactively show our team the newest and best tools as new technology emerges.



Qualifications:

Proven experience in graphic design, visual communication, or a related field, preferably in an agency or digital marketing environment.

Proven experience as an
 Designer or similar role, with a strong portfolio showcasing your expertise in designing successful
 campaigns.

Proficient in using Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms to create and manage
 campaigns.

Proficient in graphic design and video editing software such as Canva, Figma, Capcut or equivalent tools.

Strong portfolio demonstrating a solid understanding of design principles and showcasing previous ad design work for e-commerce brands.

Excellent visual and creative skills, with a keen eye for detail and aesthetics.

Ability to work collaboratively and take direction from the Director of Production and strategists, incorporating feedback to refine designs.

Strong time management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

Familiarity with social media platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok) and their respective ad formats and specifications.

Basic understanding of e-commerce and digital marketing concepts.

Excellent communication skills to effectively communicate ideas and concepts.



Note: This is a general overview of the role and responsibilities. Additional duties may be assigned as needed.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time SEO Specialist who can turn searches into traffic and traffic into growth. This role is responsible for boosting our online visibility and driving organic growth. You’ll research and target the right keywords, optimize web pages and content, improve on-page elements like titles and meta tags, and build strong off-page strategies through quality link-building. You’ll also track performance with SEO tools, run regular audits to keep our site search-engine friendly, and stay updated on the latest SEO trends. Working closely with our marketing and content teams, you’ll help us rank higher, reach more people, and deliver measurable results.



Responsibilities:

Research high-impact keywords and optimize content.

Enhance on-page SEO (titles, meta tags, links, and site structure).

Build quality backlinks and strengthen off-page presence.

Track performance with SEO tools and deliver insights.

Stay ahead of SEO trends and search engine updates.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven SEO experience and knowledge of best practices.

Hands-on experience with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, or Ahrefs.

Basic knowledge or familiarity with HTML/CSS and CMS platforms (WordPress, Shopify, etc.).

Strong analytical mindset and creativity in problem-solving.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
/watch?v=LdqINft4osw&t=75s.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – Part-Time / Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are seeking a Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing applications running in a Node.js and Firebase environment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this role, you will help maintain live systems, introduce new functionality, and ensure the backend infrastructure continues to operate efficiently and securely.



This opportunity is well suited for someone comfortable working with production systems and capable of making sound technical decisions when improving backend architecture.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and enhance backend services supporting live applications

- Develop and improve backend functionality using Node.js and Firebase

- Build and maintain RESTful APIs, cloud functions, and serverless components

- Evaluate system architecture and propose improvements when needed

- Monitor and improve system stability, performance, and security

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD pipelines and version control processes

- Work with the outgoing developer to ensure a smooth project transition

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature enhancements, and production support



Required Qualifications;

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years of hands-on experience with Node.js and Firebase

- Experience deploying and managing applications on Google Cloud Platform

- Demonstrated experience building and maintaining REST APIs and serverless backend systems

- Experience managing production environments with a focus on performance, security, and reliability (Firebase Auth, IAM roles, HTTPS, JWT)

- Familiarity with Git-based version control systems such as GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket

- Experience implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Cloud Build)

- Strong analytical thinking and ability to independently recommend technical improvements

- Clear English communication skills, especially when explaining technical approaches



Preferred Experience:

- Experience working with Firebase Cloud Functions or GCP Cloud Functions in serverless environments

- Familiarity with additional GCP services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Experience working with financial or fintech applications involving secure systems and transaction processing

- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as Firebase Analytics or GCP Logging/Monitoring

- Experience implementing secure authentication and authorization methods including OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Experience managing staging and production environments and release processes

- Familiarity with API documentation tools such as Swagger or OpenAPI

- Experience guiding backend direction or mentoring developers during project transitions



Work Schedule:

- Part-Time (Approximately 20 hours per week)

- Full-Time (Available)

Flexible working hours between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

title: Remote Medical Order & Renewal Specialist
description:
Remote Medical Order & Renewal Specialist

Location: Remote, Philippines

Job Type: Full-Time

Team Size: 3 (you'll be one of 3)

Job Type: Sales and Customer Support



Schedule

This role follows a rotating schedule, including weekend shifts, to help provide customer coverage 7 days per week.

Shift options may include:

6:00 AM to 12:00 PM Pacific Time

11:30 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Time

3:00 PM to 9:00 PM Pacific Time

Tea
mbers will rotate shifts and weekend coverage based on business needs.



Job Description

We are hiring a full-time Remote Medical Order & Renewal Specialist to help manage inbound customer inquiries and move customers from inquiry to completed order or renewal.

This role is primarily handled through text-based communication in GoHighLevel (GHL) and supports customers who are ordering, renewing, or continuing treatment within a medical workflow.

You will be responsible for answering pricing questions, confirming a customer’s current dose, matching them to the appropriate next dose in their approved titration schedule, creating orders in our internal platform, and pushing completed orders to pharmacy processing.

This role requires someone who is organized, responsive, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a healthcare-adjacent environment involving medication-related workflows.

TimeProof time tracking required.



Main Responsibilities

Respond to inbound customer inquiries, mainly by text

Answer pricing questions clearly and accurately

Confirm a customer’s current medication dose

Match customers to the correct next dose in their titration schedule based on approved internal workflow

Process orders and renewals accurately

Create customer orders in our Medusa platform

Push completed orders to pharmacy processing

Follow up with customers when information is missing

Keep customer records accurate and organized

Help support medication-related administrative workflows

Escalate clinical or medically sensitive questions to the appropriate licensed or internal tea
mber

Assist with customer follow-up and incomplete orders when inquiry volume is lighter

Help with other operational tasks as assigned

Use GoHighLevel (GHL) as the primary communication platform for managing customer conversations, follow-up, and workflow activity



Schedule and Coverage Expectations

This role is part of a rotating team schedule designed to provide customer coverage throughout the week, including weekends.

Applicants must be comfortable with:

rotating shifts

weekend work

a schedule that may change based on coverage needs

working as part of a team handoff system



Requirements

Strong written English

Strong attention to detail

Comfortable communicating with customers by text throughout the day

Able to manage multiple conversations without losing accuracy

Organized, dependable, and responsive

Reliable computer and internet connection

Able to work assigned shifts consistently

Willing to take on additional tasks as the business grows

Able to follow instructions and stay productive throughout the workday

Comfortable working within structured processes involving medication dosing, titration steps, and order handling

Able to recognize when a question should be escalated rather than answered directly



Preferred Experience

Customer service

Order entry

Patient intake

Healthcare support

Telehealth, pharmacy, or e-commerce support

Experience supporting customers in medication-related or treatment-related workflows

How Performance Will Be Measured

Number of inquiries handled

Number of completed orders processed

Accuracy of work

Response speed

Reliability and consistency

Ability to stay organized and follow the workflow correctly

Proper escalation of clinical or sensitive issues



Additional Note

We are looking for someone who wants a serious, long-term role and is comfortable being part of a team-based coverage schedule that includes weekends. This role supports customers in a medical treatment workflow, so accuracy, professionalism, and good judgment are essential.

title: Senior Bookkeeper
description:
Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Financial Operations

*Manage full-cycle bookkeeping (A/R, A/P, general ledger, reconciliations)

*Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in QuickBooks

*Process payroll and ensure accuracy of employee compensation records

*Manage invoicing, collections, and vendor payments

*Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

*Support tax preparation by maintaining organized financial documentation



Financial Reporting & Analysis

*Prepare and maintain weekly and monthly financial reports

*Build and manage Excel-based reports and dashboards to track performance

*Analyze variances in revenue, expenses, and key financial metrics

*Track KPIs and provide clear summaries of financial performance

*Assist leadership in understanding financial trends and business health



Data Integrity & Process Improvement

*Ensure accuracy and consistency across financial data and reporting systems

*Identify discrepancies and resolve issues proactively

*Improve reporting processes and streamline financial workflows

*Collaborate with leadership to improve visibility into financial performance



Required Experience & Skills

*3+ years of experience in bookkeeping, accounting, or financial operations is required

*Strong experience with QuickBooks is required.

*Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, formulas, data analysis) is required

*Experience managing A/R, A/P, payroll, and reconciliations is required

*Strong attention to detail and high level of accuracy

*Ability to organize and present financial data clearly

*Experience with doing financial auditing is a huge plus

*Experience supporting US-based businesses is a plus





TECH REQUIREMENTS

Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed





Job Type: Full-time

title: Paid Ads Creative Specialist
description:
We're looking for a high-output Paid Ads Creative Specialist to join our team and help us scale performance creative on Meta. This is a fast-paced production role — you'll be cranking out 50+ ad creatives per month across static and video formats, testing hooks, angles, and concepts to find what converts.



You know what stops the scroll. You understand the Meta creative ecosystem and can move quickly without sacrificing quality. You're equally comfortable building a punchy static image ad as you are editing a UGC-style video or motion reel.



What you'll do



Produce 50+ ad creatives per month across static (feed, story, carousel) and video (Reels, short-form) formats for Meta campaigns

Translate briefs and winning concepts into scroll-stopping creative using strong copy hooks and visuals

Iterate rapidly on top-performing ads — resizing, refreshing hooks, and creating variations to combat ad fatigue



Stay on top of Meta ad trends, format changes, and what's working in the feed

Manage your own production queue and hit weekly output targets without hand-holding



What we're looking for

- 2–4 years of experience creating paid social ads, preferably for direct-to-consumer or e-commerce brands

- Strong proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere Pro (or CapCut / DaVinci Resolve)

- Solid understanding of Meta ad formats — feed, story, Reels, carousel, and collection ads

- Ability to write short-form ad copy: punchy hooks, CTAs, and body text that sells

- Comfortable working at high volume and managing multiple briefs simultaneously

- Eye for detail — consistent branding, clean layouts, and on-brand typography

- Experience reading basic ad performance metrics (CTR, hook rate, thumb-stop ratio) is a plus

- Reliable internet connection and available during core business hours



Nice to have



- Experience with UGC-style or lo-fi video editing that mimics organic content

- Familiarity with tools like Canva Pro, Figma, or Motion Array for templates and assets

- Previous experience working with a media buyer or performance marketing team

- Basic motion graphics or After Effects skills

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
description:
Chief Operating Officer (COO)

Location: Remote

Schedule Requirement: Must work on Pacific Time hours

Job Type: Full-Time



Job Description

We are looking for a highly capable, hands-on Chief Operating Officer (COO) to help organize, restructure, and strengthen the operational side of the business.

This role is focused on creating clarity and accountability across the company. The COO will work closely with the founder and existing team to understand how work is currently being done, map out existing processes, identify inefficiencies and breakdowns, streamline workflows, define clear roles and responsibilities, and implement practical KPI tracking across departments.

This is not a passive oversight role. We are looking for someone who can actively step into the business, gather information from tea
mbers, document and improve current processes, and help turn a growing company into a more organized, scalable, and measurable operation.

The right person must be comfortable working in Pacific Time, collaborating directly with the founder and existing staff, and driving execution across teams.



Main Responsibilities

Work directly with the founder to assess the current operational structure and identify gaps

Map out existing business processes across departments and functions

Meet with existing tea
mbers to collect information, understand responsibilities, and identify inefficiencies

Work with the founder to streamline workflows and improve how the business operates day to day

Restructure tasks and processes to improve clarity, speed, accountability, and execution

Define and document clear roles and responsibilities for tea
mbers and departments

Help redesign job functions where needed to better fit business needs

Create and implement KPI frameworks across teams and roles

Establish reporting structures and accountability systems

Identify bottlenecks, redundancies, and operational breakdowns, and recommend practical solutions

Improve internal coordination across departments

Help prioritize operational initiatives and ensure follow-through

Assist in building a more scalable operating structure as the business grows



What This Person Will Be Expected to Do

Map how the business currently operates

Identify what is unclear, inefficient, duplicated, or broken

Work with the founder to simplify and streamline processes

Turn unclear responsibilities into clearly defined ownership

Turn scattered tasks into repeatable workflows

Turn team activity into measurable performance

Create systems that make it easier to manage people, priorities, and results



Requirements

Strong operations background

Proven experience building, documenting, and improving workflows and processes

Experience mapping business processes and identifying operational gaps

Experience defining roles, responsibilities, and accountability systems

Experience creating KPIs and performance reporting across teams

Strong communication skills and ability to work with different personalities across a team

Able to gather information directly from tea
mbers and translate it into operational improvements

Comfortable stepping into an existing business and making structure out of ambiguity

Highly organized, practical, and execution-focused

Must be available to work on Pacific Time hours

Must be comfortable working closely with the founder and existing staff

Must be willing to use TimeProof timekeeping software as part of the role



Preferred Experience

Experience in founder-led businesses

Experience in fast-moving or operationally messy companies that need structure

Experience managing cross-functional teams

Experience in healthcare, telehealth, e-commerce, or service businesses is a plus

Experience implementing scorecards, SOPs, departmental KPIs, and reporting systems



How Performance Will Be Measured

Completion and quality of process mapping across the business

Improvement in workflow efficiency and accountability

Improvement in clarity of team roles and responsibilities

Creation and implementation of KPI systems across departments

Reduction in confusion, redundancy, and operational bottlenecks

Better visibility into team performance and business execution

Ability to create structure that the team actually follows



To Apply

Please send:

your resume

a short summary of your operations experience

examples of companies or teams you have helped organize or restructure

examples of processes, KPI systems, or accountability structures you have built

your availability in Pacific Time



Additional Note

We are looking for someone who is not just strategic, but also highly practical. This role requires someone who can work with the founder and team to map current processes, streamline operations, create accountability, and build a stronger operating system for the business. Use of TimeProof timekeeping software is required for this role.

title: Billing & Procurement Account Manager
description:
About Edge360 / Staff360

Edge360 / Staff360 is a trusted Managed Service Provider (MSP) and Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) agency. We help businesses streamline operations, optimize technology, and scale efficiently by providing reliable IT solutions and outsourcing support.

We’re growing fast and looking for motivated professionals who want to be part of a team that drives digital transformation.



Position Overview

We’re hiring a Billing & Procurement Account Manager who will play a key role in managing billing, procurement, and financial operations. This role requires someone detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.

You’ll be the go-to person for ensuring accuracy in billing, smooth procurement processes, and strong vendor relationships—all while supporting our MSP and BPO projects.



Key Responsibilities

Prepare accurate and competitive quotes for client projects in collaboration with sales and technical teams.

Manage procurement: sourcing, ordering, and tracking hardware, software, and other project resources.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Accounting, or related field (or equivalent experience).

At least 3 years of experience in billing, procurement, or financial management—preferably in MSP, BPO, or IT services.

Proficiency in financial software (QuickBooks, SAP, etc.) and project management tools (Microsoft Project, Asana, etc.).

Strong knowledge of procurement processes, vendor management, and invoicing best practices.

Excellent communication skills and the ability to work well with both internal teams and external partners.

High attention to detail, strong analytical skills, and problem-solving ability.

Ability to multitask and prioritize in a deadline-driven environment.

What We Offer

title: Customer Support Experts Needed
description:
We are now hiring Customer Support Experts to assist our customers over the phone.

This is a full-time position only with long-term potential



Customers will call us and ask for assistance with various tasks, such as:



Checking their
 accounts

Purchasing items they need

Signing up for services

Logging into or managing their accounts

Checking or signing up for credit score reports

Conducting general online searches



The tasks we handle are all things that can be done online.



PAY & EARNING STRUCTURE



Base rate starts at $4.50 per hour.

Agents usually work 10 hours per day including the paid breaks, and we allow more hours if someone wants to earn more.

During busy times, we also pay time-and-a-half overtime when we need additional coverage.

Good performers can earn a monthly bonus between $60 and $150.

There is a $50 monthly attendance bonus for consistent on-time performance.

Every 6 months, we evaluate performance and agents can receive up to an extra $0.50 per hour added to their rate if they are doing well.



With base hours plus bonuses and performance increases, a strong performer can earn up to around $1,100 per month.



This is the roadmap of our hiring process:



- You will take a quiz that typically takes about an hour to complete.

- If you pass the quiz, you will be invited to take two live mock calls or skill tests. The first one usually takes around 20 minutes, and the second one is longer, typically about an hour.

- Once you pass, you will then proceed with orientation and training.



Please note that our quizzes and skill tests can be challenging for beginners and require sharpness, speed and excellent attention to details. If you believe you possess these skills, feel free to apply.



You need to have fluent English as well as having very good internet connection and a quiet place to work.

Please apply only if you are fully available for a full-time position.

Please do not apply if you are not based in the Philippines.



When You Apply*



Please answer the following questions:



1. How many hours are you available daily, and on which days of the week?

2. How soon are you ready to start?



Lastly, please include a link to a Vocaroo audio recording (minimum 45 seconds) where you briefly introduce yourself. Tell us a bit about your background, relevant experience, and one hobby you genuinely enjoy. This is a voice account and you will be supporting customers, so it's essential that you send a high-quality voice recording.



Thanks,

Aron

title: Meta ADS Pixel Expert
description:
**Meta Ads Pixel Setup Specialist (Done-For-You + Training)**

Part-time / Project-based | Remote



Lead generation tracking setup across CC360 (GoHighLevel), Typeform, and Calendly



---



**ABOUT THE ROLE**



I run two brands in the credit repair and business coaching space — Limitless Financial Solutions and Credit To Cashflow Academy. I'm running Meta ads and need a pixel expert to set everything up properly so I can track my leads, form submissions, and call bookings from end to end.



This is not just a "do it and disappear" role. I want someone who will set it up correctly AND walk me through what they did and why — so I understand my own tracking setup.



My flow for credit repair funnel is VSL, Typeform, Calendly to book a call, thank you page: 



My flow for credit to cashflow is VSL, Typeform, Calendly to book a call, thank you page: 

---



**WHAT YOU'LL BE SETTING UP**



- Meta Pixel + Conversions API — installed and verified on my Meta Ads account, connected to my funnel

- Course Creator 360 (GoHighLevel white-label) — pixel firing on lead capture and form submission events

- Typeform — application form tracking (lead form submitted, completed)

- Calendly — call booking tracking (appointment scheduled event)

- Meta Events Manager — verify all events are firing correctly, test events confirmed clean



---



**WHAT I NEED FROM YOU**



1. Full pixel and conversion event setup across all platforms listed above

2. Screen-recorded walkthrough of everything you set up so I can learn and reference it

3. Brief written summary (Loom or Google Doc) explaining what each event tracks and why it matters

4. Available for a 30-min Zoom Q&A after setup to answer my questions



---



**YOU'RE THE RIGHT FIT IF**



? You've set up Meta Pixels and Conversions API before — not just watched tutorials

? You have experience with GoHighLevel, CC360 (GHL WHITE LABEL) Typeform, or Calendly integrations

? You can explain what you're doing in plain English — not just technical jargon

? You're detail-oriented and won't call it "done" until events are verified clean in Events Manager

? You have samples or examples of previous pixel setups you can show



---



**DO NOT APPLY IF**



? You've only set up basic pixel installs with no conversion tracking experience

? You can't communicate clearly in English (written and spoken)

? You need 5 days to respond to a message



---



**TO APPLY**



Send me a message with the following:



1. A brief description of a similar pixel setup you've done (platform, what you tracked, any issues you ran into)

2. Your experience with GHL/CC360, Typeform, or Calendly specifically

3. Your rate for this project

4. Your availability for a quick intro call



Generic applications will not be considered. Show me you read this post.

title: medical assistant
description:
Founding Virtual Medical Assistant (VMA)

Schedule: US Eastern Standard Time (EST)

Reports to: Practice Manager / Founding Director



Role Overview:

As our Founding VMA, you are the clinical heartbeat of our remote operations. You will support our on-site team in Ogden, NC, by managing real-time clinical data, patient communications, and care coordination. Your goal is  you will be  handling the "live" clinical documentation, patient follow-ups,  to ensure the provider can focus entirely on the patient while you handle the "behind-the-scenes" clinical workflow.



 (Key Responsibilities):

Virtual Scribing & Documentation: Assist the provider by documenting patient encounters in real-time within the EHR, ensuring high accuracy and HIPAA compliance.



Patient Navigation: Act as the "Clinical Compass" by handling patient calls, explaining basic clinical instructions, and coordinating follow-up care.



Prescription & Lab Management: Process e-prescriptions, track lab results (Quest/Labcorp), and ensure the provider reviews all incoming clinical data promptly.



Triage Support: Conduct virtual "pre-visits" or intake calls to gather patient history, medications, and chief complaints before the appointment.



Referral Coordination: Manage the outbound referral process, ensuring patients are successfully connected with outside facilities when necessary.



Technical Qualifications:

US Clinical Experience: 2+ years of experience as a Virtual Medical Assistant for a US-based clinic (Primary Care or Acute Care preferred).



Medical Knowledge: Strong grasp of medical terminology, anatomy, and common acute care medications.



EHR Proficiency: Experience with cloud-based EHRs (e.g., Elation, Athena, or Kareo).



English Fluency: Native-level verbal and written English (must be comfortable speaking directly with US patients over the phone).



The Fit:

Dependable: You understand that in a boutique practice, every minute counts. You are logged in and ready before the first patient arrives.



Detail-Oriented: You don't just "input data"; you ensure the clinical story is accurate and the "i's" are dotted.



Team-Oriented: You work seamlessly with the on-site Lead MA and the Virtual Practice Manager via Slack or Teams.



Lab Familiarity: Do you know how to read a basic CBC or Metabolic panel to ensure the results are filed correctly in the EHR?



Phone Etiquette: Do you have a "clinical voice"? (Calm, empathetic, and professional, especially when a patient is calling with an acute illness).



Hardware/Internet: Do you have a noise-canceling headset and a verified high-speed fiber connection (with a backup power source)?



Why Pivot Health?

Founding Role: You are Member #1 of our virtual team. Your voice matters.



Fixed Schedule: Standard US Eastern Time (EST) business hours (No rotating shifts).



Long-term Stability: We are building a permanent practice, not a short-term project.



Direct Partnership: Work directly with the Founder in a high-trust, respectful environment.



How to Apply:

Don’t just send a resume. Send a brief intro about your experience working with a US-based clinic operations and why you want to help us launch a new practice. Also send a video of you introducing yourself and why you are the best fit for our brand new clinic.  Also write a brief answer to this question. We want an authentic answer. No AI

A patient calls in a panic because their pharmacy says their prescription wasn't sent. The provider is currently in an exam with another patient. How do you handle this?

title: Full-Stack Software
description:
Job Title: Full Stack Software Developer (R-H Platform)?

Location: Remote

Job Type: Gig Contract



About Us:?R-H platform is a cutting-edge health tech company developing a comprehensive SAAS and Mobile App platform. We are looking for a talented and driven Full Stack Software Developer to help build and launch a working prototype of our platform.



Job Overview:?As a Full Stack Software Developer, you will be responsible for developing both the SAAS platform and Mobile App (iOS). This role involves working on both the front-end and back-end of the application, designing and implementing key features, and collaborating closely with our product team to create an intuitive and seamless user experience. You will play a key role in building a working prototype of the platform for internal testing and future deployment.



Key Responsibilities:

* Develop the Full Stack of the Platform: Build, test, and maintain the R-H SAAS platform and Mobile App (iOS) from front-end to back-end.

* Front-End Development: Use modern JavaScript frameworks like React.js to develop the web interface and ensure a user-friendly experience.

* Back-End Development: Develop RESTful APIs and manage databases using Node.js (Express), MongoDB, or PostgreSQL.

* Mobile App Development: Develop a cross-platform mobile app using React Native or Flutter for iOS and Android.

* Authentication & Security: Implement secure user authentication, role-based access control, and data protection features using JWT or other security protocols.

* Database Management: Set up and manage database schema, optimize queries, and ensure data integrity.

* Collaborate with Teams: Work closely with product manager, designers, to meet business requirements and design scalable solutions.

* Prototype Testing: Help test the prototype, resolve issues, and optimize performance for a smooth user experience.

* API Integration: Integrate third-party APIs (e.g., for notifications, payment processing, etc.) and ensure seamless connectivity.

* Iterate and Improve: Contribute to an agile development process, ensuring fast iterations and improvements based on feedback.



Required Skills and Qualifications:

* Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer with expertise in both front-end and back-end technologies.

* Front-End: Proficiency in React.js

* Back-End: Strong experience with Node.js and Express. Familiarity with RESTful APIs  and microservices architecture.

* Database: Experience with MongoDB, PostgreSQL, or other relational/non-relational databases.

* Mobile App Development: Experience with React Native or Flutter for building cross-platform mobile apps.

* Version Control: Proficient in Git and GitHub for version control and collaboration.

* Authentication: Experience with JWT, OAuth, or other security mechanisms for handling user authentication and authorization.

* Agile Development: Familiarity with agile methodologies and experience working in iterative development cycles.

* Problem-Solving: Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to debug and optimize code.

* Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate with remote teams effectively.

* Bonus: Experience in healthcare technology systems is a plus.



Preferred Qualifications:

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

* Experience in developing and deploying cloud-based SAAS platforms.

* Knowledge of containerization tools like Docker or cloud platforms like AWS or Google Cloud.

* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.



Benefits:

* Flexible work hours with remote work opportunities.

* Opportunity to work on a high-impact project in the growing health tech industry.

* Gain experience working on both web and mobile applications in a fast-paced environment.



How to Apply:?Interested candidates are encouraged to send their resume and a portfolio/GitHub link showcasing relevant projects.

Please include a brief cover letter explaining why you’re the perfect fit for the role.

title: Executive Operations Partner (EA & Ops)
description:
We are a US-based boutique staffing firm seeking an Executive Operations Partner to serve as the "Right Hand" to the Founder. This is not a traditional VA role; this is a high-level partnership for a proactive professional who can manage the "science" of our back-office and talent operations.



You will own the operational integrity of the business, ensuring that candidate profiles, internal processes, and administrative workflows meet a "New York" standard of excellence. While we can teach you our specific invoicing and resume-building methods, you must already be an expert in systems, automation, and process documentation.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Talent Operations & Curation: Reviewing candidate applications, sorting talent based on strict criteria, and "polishing" resumes. You will be responsible for creating the professional dossiers and profiles that we present to our US clients.



Process Documentation (SOPs): You will observe our manual tasks and turn them into crystal-clear Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs). You are the "Librarian" of our business knowledge.



Workflow Automation: Audit our current admin processes and implement automations using Zapier, 
, or Airtable to ensure we are operating at peak efficiency.



Client Relations & Onboarding: Act as the primary point of contact for US clients. You will manage the onboarding lifecycle, ensuring contracts are signed and clients are successfully integrated.



Calendar & Inbox Mastery: Triage the Founder’s inbox and manage a complex schedule across multiple US time zones. You protect the Founder’s time so they can focus on high-level growth.



Legal & Compliance Support: Assist in drafting service agreements, managing document storage (DocuSign/SignNow), and ensuring all company paperwork is accurate and organized.



Requirements:



5-8+ Years as a Senior EA, Ops Manager, or TA Ops Lead: Experience in a fast-paced US startup or professional services environment.



The "Systems" Brain: You think in logic gates. You see a repetitive task and immediately think about how to automate it.



Technical Writing Skills: You have a gift for taking messy information and turning it into a clean, professional, and persuasive document (resumes, profiles, reports).



Technical Stack: Expert in Google Workspace, Airtable/Notion, and Workflow Automation tools (Zapier/Make).



Proactive Intelligence: You don’t wait for a task list; you see an operational gap and you close it.



Shift: US Business Hours (EST). Full-time, 40 hours per week.



Compensation & Benefits:



$950 – $1,100 USD / month (based on experience).



15/30 Payment Schedule: Paid bi-monthly via Wise.



Impact: You will be the foundational hire for our operations team with room to move into a Director of Ops role.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please reply with the subject line: [Ops Partner Application - (Your Name)] and include the following:



A link to your LinkedIn Profile.



A sample of a Process Document or SOP you have written for a previous client.



A brief note describing a complex automation you built or a time you had to "re-write" a process to make it more efficient.

title: Qualified Accountant / Financial Controller for UK Property Company
description:
We are a UK Property Company turning over £4 million with assets of £40 million

We need a qualified Accountant to act as a Financial Controller performing a number of internal financial roles. The right person will be familiar with UK Company Accounts and Taxation and have experience working for a UK company in a similar role. 

We operate as a group with 12 different UK Property Companies, a UK Management company and a UK Building Company. All our accounts are in Xero so Xero expertise is essential. We use excel to store our main data so excel expertise is also essential

The main roles will be as follows

1. To prepare cashflow forecasts for the Group Companies and to monitor their performance month by month and to advise the Directors how to ensure we keep in budget

2. To prepare individual budgets for the many building works we carry out and to ensure jobs are carried out on time and on budget

3. To co-ordinate planned expenditure to ensure it is affordable by each individual Property Company

4. To monitor rent allocations into Xero.

5. To monitor expenditure and to ensure that all queries raised by our bookkeeper regarding missing invoices are answered. As part of that role to look at the systems we are using to ensure that monies spent are linked to the relevant invoice. So for example when we pay bills to utility suppliers by direct debit ensuring that the relevant invoice can be found and posted

6. To monitor the activities of our bookkeeper and Accountant in the preparation of monthly accounts and yearly accounts and tax returns. 

7. To advise on tax payments due and ensure funds for payment are available

8. To advise generally on managing our various bank accounts and getting best returns from surplus funds

9. To advise the Directors on all financial matters relating to the group

Key Requirements

1. Experience working with UK companies in a similar role. Work with US or Australian companies will not qualify for this job

2. Formal Accounting qualifications

3. Xero Expertise

4. Excel Expertise

5. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English

6. Experience advising UK Companies on financial matters and the ability to give practical advice on financial problems that arise from time to time

7. The ability to monitor staff. You will be responsible for a team of 4 people which we are expecting to expand

If this is you please apply with a detailed CV

title: Shortform Video Editor
description:
About us

We're a Yarraville-based group of businesses led by Managing Director Derrick Wong.



1. FINR Advisory - Finance broking & buyers advocacy

FINR Advisory is a specialist finance broking and buyers advocacy firm. We've educated 3,000+ Australian property investors and give our clients access to 2,500+ home loan options across a broad panel of lenders. Our mission is to cut through the industry smokescreen and help everyday Australians become wealthier and more financially secure through property. 



2. Nexia Health Care - Neurodevelopment & mental health

Nexia Health Care is a one-stop hub for neurodevelopment and mental health services, with an integrated team of paediatricians, psychiatrists, and allied health professionals. We specialise in holistic care for children and adolescents, removing the fragmented-care and long-wait experience that families usually have to navigate. 



Whichever brand you're editing for, our content should feel warm, clear, and genuinely useful - never gimmicky.



The role

You'll turn our raw webinar footage, talking-head clips, and ideas into punchy shortform videos. This isn't “cut the clip and add captions” - we want a creator who can shape a story, design a hook, and keep a viewer watching to the CTA.

What you'll do:

• Edit shortform videos across Reels, TikToks, Shorts, and LinkedIn

• Generate AI static images and AI video assets for b-roll, thumbnails, and visual metaphors

• Structure content with a clear flow: Hook ? Value ? CTA

• Add dynamic subtitles/captions, fast-paced cuts, zooms, and transitions

• Use trending sound effects and transitions while keeping it on-brand

• Repurpose longform webinars into multiple shortform pieces

• Ship consistently across multiple brands without losing quality

Must-have skills and experience

• Strong CapCut proficiency (desktop and/or mobile)

• Ability to generate AI static images AND AI videos (e.g., Midjourney, Runway, Kling, Sora, Leonardo)

• Proven ability to create attention-grabbing shortform content — not just clip editing

• Dynamic, on-trend subtitles and captions

• Fast-paced cuts, zooms, and transitions

• Solid grasp of shortform structure (hook, value, CTA)

• Up to date with trending sounds and transitions across TikTok/Reels

• Fast output — can ship multiple finished videos per day when needed

• Good written English for on-screen text and captions

Nice to have:

• Experience in finance, property, real estate, healthcare, or educational content

• Thumbnail design for YouTube

• Basic motion graphics / After Effects

• Experience repurposing webinars into shortform

How to apply

Please send the following — applications missing any of these will not be reviewed:

1. A link to your portfolio or showreel (Google Drive, YouTube, or Vimeo is fine)

2. 2–3 shortform videos you've personally edited that match the style we're looking for (links or files)

3. Short answers to the screening questions below

Screening questions:

• Which AI tools do you currently use for image and video generation, and what do you use each for?

• Walk us through how you'd structure a 45-second video from a 30-minute webinar recording.

• Describe a hook you've written or edited that performed well. What made it work?

• What's your realistic turnaround time for one polished 30–60 second shortform video, and how do you use templates or workflows to get faster over time?

• Are you available full-time, with some overlap with Melbourne business hours (AEST/AEDT)?



Submission details

 your portfolio link, sample videos, and screening question answers to 
 before Friday, 1 May 2026.

Please use the subject line: “Video Editor – [Your Name]”.

We read every application. If you're a fit, we'll be in touch within 5–7 days.

title: Meta Ads Video Editor for scaling 6-Figure ecommerce brand
description:
**JOB DESCRIPTION**



Hey there, I’m Carter, founder of a fast-growing DTC brand scaling through Meta 
 & Instagram) ads.



We’ve generated consistent revenue using paid social, and now I’m looking to bring on a **high-level Meta Ads Video Editor** who understands how to turn simple scripts into scroll-stopping ads.



We primarily run **AI UGC-style creatives**, so your role is not just editing — it’s helping bring concepts to life using AI-generated footage, clean editing, and strong hooks that actually stop the scroll.



You must understand how to structure ads that perform.



---



**Your Role**



Turn scripts into high-converting Meta ads using AI UGC.



Each concept = **3 videos**



* Same body

* Different hooks



Your job is to:



* Generate or source AI UGC-style footage

* Edit clean, native-looking ads (iPhone-style, not overproduced)

* Swap hooks effectively while keeping the body consistent

* Add simple captions, pacing, and flow that keeps retention high



Everything should feel natural, not like an ad.



---



**What We’re Looking For**



* Experience editing **Meta ads for DTC brands**

* Strong understanding of **hook-first structure (first 1–3 seconds matter most)**

* Ability to create or work with **AI UGC-style content**

* Knows how to keep edits clean, simple, and native (no flashy YouTube-style editing)

* Understands pacing, retention, and what makes people keep watching



---



**This Is NOT For You If**



* You only edit long-form YouTube videos

* You rely on heavy effects, transitions, or over-editing

* You don’t understand direct response / performance creatives

* You need constant direction — I need someone who gets it



---



**Bonus If You:**



* Have worked with AI video tools (Higgsfield, Sora, etc.)

* Can replicate high-performing ad styles

* Understand testing structure (hooks vs body)



---



**How to Apply**



Send:



1. Examples of Meta ads you’ve edited (especially UGC or AI UGC)

2. Brief explanation of your process

3. Confirm you understand this structure:



   * 1 concept = 3 videos

   * Same body, different hooks

title: Sales and Booking Coordinator
description:

Must be available to work weekends

We are seeking a Sales & Booking Coordinator to manage incoming leads, handle bookings, and support daily sales operations for our cleaning services business. This is a client-facing role that requires strong communication skills, organization, and attention to detail.



The ideal candidate will be responsible for converting inquiries into confirmed bookings, coordinating schedules efficiently, and ensuring a seamless experience for both clients and cleaning providers.



**Key Responsibilities

-Respond promptly to inbound leads (calls, texts,
s, and online inquiries)

-Convert inquiries into confirmed bookings

-Follow up on quotes, missed calls, and unresponsive leads

-Maintain and update the booking calendar accurately

-Coordinate schedules with cleaners and the operations team

-Handle rescheduling requests, cancellations, and client inquiries

-Maintain accurate records in CRM or booking systems

-Deliver excellent customer service at all times

-Proven experience in sales, booking, or customer support (service-based industry preferred)

-Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

-Comfortable and confident handling phone calls and client interactions

-Highly organized with strong attention to detail

-Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

-Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace (noise-canceling headset required)

-Must be available to work weekends and fixed MST hours

title: System Administrator & Support Specialist
description:
PFS Global is seeking to hire a remote, tech savvy System Administrator to work for our full-service business management company which is located in California, United States. This is a dual-purpose role focused on modernizing our infrastructure and providing high-level technical support. You will be instrumental in our transition from legacy on-premise setups to a cloud-first architecture. We are looking to fill this position immediately. Please only apply if you meet the below qualifications:



Qualifications:

1 - Must type 55 WPM (you will be tested)

2 - Must have minimum internet speeds of 25/25 mbps (download/upload)

3 - Team player with excellent communication skills in English

4 - Full-time availability at 40 hours / week , Mon - Fri (Pacific Standard Time)



Key Responsibilities:

• Project Work (70%): Infrastructure deployment, Azure management, automation, and cloud migration.

• Support/Help Desk (30%): User troubleshooting, device enrollment, and ticketing via Jira.

• Infrastructure Modernization: Decommissioning on-prem servers and migrating to serverless/cloud environments.

• Device Management: Enrolling workstations, managing user attributes and device policies.

• Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs): Creating clear, step-by-step documentation for common IT tasks (e.g., "How to Reset a Password," "How to Setup OpenVPN").

• AI & Automation: Working alongside me to implement cloud-first and AI-powered automation. We will use AI to generate code, or use it to make decisions in a larger algorithm.

Administrative Support: Assisting the broader admin team with routing phone calls and managing high-priority service requests.



Technical Requirements (The "Must-Haves")

The ideal candidate doesn't need 10 years of experience, but they must have a fundamental, deep understanding of how the internet and networking work. Cloud & Virtualization



• Azure: Managing Virtual Machines, Files, and Microsoft Entra ID.

• Google Workspace: Admin-level management including Gmail, Drive & App Script

• Identity Management: User management in Google Workspace, Microsoft Entra, and Active Directory

• Virtual Desktops: Supporting On-Prem RDS Environments and/or Azure Virtual Desktop Productivity & Automation

• Scripting: Familiarity with automation via scripting languages (Bash, PowerShell, JavaScript, Python, etc.)

• Configuration Management: understanding of config file formats (JSON, YAML, INI, etc.). Also, OS Configuration like environmental variables and “PATH” management.

• Ticketing: Experience with Jira Service Management.



Candidate Persona & Culture Fit

• We want someone who is genuinely curious about technology and spends their free time learning how things work under the hood.

• We value fundamental knowledge and "hunger" over specific years of experience in a single tool.

• Must be able to follow technical flowcharts and documentation to execute complex tasks independently.

• High-proficiency in English (required for system management and global team collaboration).

• You will need to create flowcharts and documentation in English as well, so writing is important.



Monthly Compensation Package: ?51,500 (Inclusive of Basic Hourly Pay, De Minimis Benefits, and Non-Taxable Allowances.) Paid as an Employee through our Philippines Representative Office. 



Paid as an Employee through our Philippines Representative Office.



If you meet the above qualifications, and the description above sounds like the position that you are looking for, please apply and forward us your typing (WPM) and internet (upload/download) speeds in order to get an interview.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat !
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Instagram DM Setter / Sales Support for Women’s Online Fitness Coaching Brand
description:
Set The Standard (STS) is a women-focused online fitness coaching business built around body composition change, confidence, structure and long-term results.



We help women stop spinning their wheels and start making real progress through personalised coaching that fits their life. Our brand is known for being warm, direct, high-standard and genuinely supportive without being fluffy or overhyped.



This is not a generic sales role and it is not a mass-DM role. We care deeply about the client experience, brand voice and the quality of every interaction in our inbox. We want someone who can help us manage and move conversations properly while protecting the trust we have built.



You will be supporting a brand that values strong communication, organisation, emotional intelligence and commercial awareness. If you are thoughtful, sharp, reliable and want to be part of a business with high standards, this role could be a very strong fit.



What we are hiring:



We are hiring a DM Setter / Sales Support tea
mber to help manage Instagram conversations, warm leads, support inbound and outbound messaging, move the right women toward calls or applications and keep our lead flow organised.



This role is relationship-heavy first and sales-heavy second. We are not looking for a pushy closer or someone who relies on robotic scripts. We are looking for someone who can read people well, communicate naturally, ask good questions, follow clear SOPs and know when to move a conversation forward versus when to escalate.



You will be working inside our Instagram ecosystem, helping with inbound enquiries, warm outbound, follow-up, comment support, basic lead qualification, CRM updates, and daily reporting. You must be able to sound human, brand-aligned, and emotionally intelligent while still keeping conversations commercially useful.



This is a high-trust role. You will be handling real conversations with real women, so tone, judgement, confidentiality, and consistency matter a lot.



This role has capacity to move into more hours of work.

title: Onboarding Representatives
description:
About the Role



Agenta is a LinkedIn growth and acquisition agency scaling fast. We run a high-volume setter onboarding operation and we need someone who can own the hiring call pipeline end to end.



You will be speaking directly with applicants, walking them through the role, building trust, handling objections, and securing account access from every qualified setter we bring on. This is a calls-based role. You are the last filter between us and a fully onboarded operator.



What You Will Be Doing



- Running 20 to 30 onboarding and hiring calls per week with DM Setter applicants

- Walking applicants through the role structure, compensation, and access requirements

- Handling objections confidently and keeping the conversation moving toward a close

- Collecting LinkedIn credentials and inputting account details into our internal software (MoreLogin)

- Maintaining an organized tracker of call outcomes, applicant status, and onboarding progress

- Reporting directly to the founder on pipeline health and conversion rates



Who We Are Looking For



- Proven experience on sales, recruiting, or persuasion-based calls. This is non-negotiable

- Fluent English speaker with strong verbal communication and the ability to hold a conversation under pressure

- Comfortable with the close. You do not fold when someone pushes back

- Organized and reliable. You track your work, follow up, and do not drop the ball

- Tech comfortable. Able to navigate basic software tools and follow a process



How to Apply
