- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: B2B Outbound Appointment Setter - Canadian Market
description:
We are Top-Cleaning, a B2B commercial service company based in Markham, Ontario (Canada). We do not sell pre-packaged cleaning; we customize solutions for medium-sized offices, medical clinics, and law firms.



We are looking for a relentless B2B Outbound Appointment Setter.



The Role:

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 4 hours/day (EST Timezone).

Pay: $4.00 USD/hour (Paid weekly via Wise/Remitly) + Bonuses.

Task: Make 80+ outbound calls per shift to Canadian businesses.

Goal: Bypass the gatekeeper and schedule a no-obligation facility visit for our administrator. You will NOT be closing sales.



Requirements:

Proven experience in B2B Cold Calling / Outbound Sales.

Fluent English communication.

High resilience to rejection and gatekeeper objections.

Quiet workspace and a reliable internet connection.



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):

To prove your attention to detail and spoken English, you must include a voice recording in your application.



Submit your application/message directly through this job post on OnlineJobs.ph.



Put a 
 or Google Drive audio link at the very top of your application message, recording yourself reading this exact script:



"Hi, I'm looking for the person who handles office management or facility maintenance. My name is [Your Name] with Top Cleaning. We customize commercial cleaning solutions for offices here in Markham, and I'm just calling to see if it makes sense for our manager to drop by this week and leave some information."



Applications without the audio link will be immediately deleted.

title: Guest Experience Manager — Short-Term Rental Co-Hosting
description:
Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week. Primary coverage US Central Time business hours (approximately 10pm–7am Philippine Time) with on-call rotation for escalations.



Role Type: Senior role, manages one direct report



Job Overview

Divergent Estates is a US-based short-term rental co-hosting company managing 56+ properties across 15 states. We're growing toward 200 properties and are hiring a Guest Experience Manager to own the full guest journey — from booking to post-stay review — and lead a small team.



This is a senior role for someone who has done STR guest experience work before, has handled real claims with Airbnb and Vrbo, and is ready to coach a Coordinator while owning strategy. If you're used to being the person others escalate to, this is for you.



What You'll Own

• High-stakes guest situations and difficult conversations

• Claims and disputes end-to-end (8–12/month): documentation, Airbnb/Vrbo case management, negotiation, insurance coordination

• Review management: owner-approved responses, spotting patterns, coordinating post-stay asks

• Coaching and managing one Guest Experience Coordinator (daily support, weekly 1:1s)

• Guest communication strategy: templates, SOPs, tone, escalation logic, AI messaging optimization

• Cross-functional coordination with Maintenance and Cleaning teams

• 24/7 coverage planning and on-call escalation logic



Success in the First 90 Days Looks Like

• Average human response time drops from 11 minutes to under 5 minutes

• Negative guest sentiment drops from 7.9% toward 4%

• Claim resolution time shortens, recovery amounts improve

• The Coordinator is handling 80%+ of routine guest comms without escalation

• Owners report fewer surprises and faster communication on guest issues



Must-Have Qualifications

• Minimum 3 years in short-term rental or hospitality guest experience (direct, not adjacent)

• Experience managing or coaching at least one direct report

• Hands-on experience with Airbnb and Vrbo claims and disputes (can speak fluently about AirCover, case escalations, and what works in pushing back)

• Exceptional written English — clear, warm, professional

• Proficient with Hostaway, Breezeway, Airbnb, Vrbo, Asana, Slack

• Comfortable on phone calls with upset guests and US-based property owners

• Reliable schedule and high-speed internet

• Available during US Central Time business hours



What Makes the Best Candidates Stand Out

• You've personally hosted or managed STR properties

• You can de-escalate a guest situation over text with tone alone

• You've coached a tea
mber fro
diocre to strong

• You have opinions on what makes AI guest messaging work or fail

• You've successfully pushed back on Airbnb when they got claims wrong



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A 150–300 word written response to: “Describe the most difficult guest situation you've personally handled. What made it difficult, what you did, what the outcome was, and what you would do differently.”

3. A 100–200 word written response to: “What's one thing most property managers get wrong about guest experience?”

4. Any links to writing samples, guest responses, or review responses you've written



Applications without the written responses will not be reviewed.





Finalists will complete a paid 2–3 hour trial task with real anonymized scenarios from our business.

title: Content Clipper (Short-Form Video) — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:
